isOwner().details: Returns true if the caller is the current owner.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

peek().return: value value price of rbtchasValue flag that is indicating the price is working or not

setPrice(uint256).details: set mock pricecan only be called by owner

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

userdoc.notice: Mock medianizer contract that will support for MoC medianizer interface to be used for testnet
